message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 2 assignData

actor Actor

participant "CatERingAppManager.eventManager:EventManager" as EM
participant "eventManager.currentEvent:Event" as EV
participant "r:EventReceiver" as ER

Actor -> EM : assignData(name,date,location,numberOfParticipants,serviceType,tipologyNote)

alt [currentEvent == null]
    EM -->> Actor : Throw UseCaseLogicException
else
    EM -> EV : setName(name)
    EV -> EV
    EM -> EV : setDate(date)
    EV -> EV
    EM -> EV : setLocation(location)
    EV -> EV
    EM -> EV : setNumberOfParticipants(numberOfParticipants)
    EV -> EV
    EM -> EV : setServiceType(serviceType)
    EV -> EV
    EM -> EV : setTipologyNote(tipologyNote)
    EV -> EV
    
    loop for each r in receivers
        EM -> ER : notifyDataAssigned(currentEvent)
    end
    
    EM -->> Actor
end

@enduml
```
